chair_1012.precise_instruction: Attach the lower side rail between the front leg and the rear support.
Attach the second side frame to the ends of the horizontal support rails.
Attach the upper crossbar between the two inner side supports.
Attach the seat panel across the top side rails.
Attach the top rail between the two backrest posts.
Attach the top crossbar between the two upper side frames.
Attach the top panel onto the upper frame.
